ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff YUNHUA GU (Tel: 808-724-3213) in pro per, assisted by court certified Mandarin-language interpreter AMANDA PETERS (certification number 301183);
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ORA DEL RANCH LLC's Motion To Dismiss.

The Court indicates that the plaintiff did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted as unopposed.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT ORA DEL RANCH, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Deputy: Not Present. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ORA DEL RANCH LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The Lavoipierre declaration states that plaintiff Yunhua Gu failed to respond to defendant's meet and confer requests. Parties are ordered to meet and confer in person, by telephone, or by video conference per CCP 430.41. Responsive pleadings are now due by May 20, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
